=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_union.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:21
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const pipe(MyUnion) = Schema.Union([
  Schema.Literal("A"),
  Schema.Literal("B")
])


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_union.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:21
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyUnion: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Literal<"A">, Schema.Literal<"B">]> = Schema.Union([
  Schema.Literal("A"),
  Schema.Literal("B")
])


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_union.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:21
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyUnion = () => Schema.Union([
  Schema.Literal("A"),
  Schema.Literal("B")
])


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Make Schema opaque" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_union.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:21
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyUnion_ = Schema.Union([
  Schema.Literal("A"),
  Schema.Literal("B")
])
export type MyUnion = Schema.Schema.Type<typeof MyUnion_>;
export type MyUnionEncoded = Schema.Codec.Encoded<typeof MyUnion_>;
export type MyUnionDecodingServices = Schema.Codec.DecodingServices<typeof MyUnion_>;
export type MyUnionEncodingServices = Schema.Codec.EncodingServices<typeof MyUnion_>;
export const MyUnion: Schema.Codec<MyUnion, MyUnionEncoded, MyUnionDecodingServices, MyUnionEncodingServices> = MyUnion_;


=== [R1] Refactor 4: "Make Schema opaque with namespace" ===

--- file:///.src/makeSchemaOpaque_union.ts ---
// refactor: 4:14-4:21
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyUnion_ = Schema.Union([
  Schema.Literal("A"),
  Schema.Literal("B")
])
export interface MyUnion extends Schema.Schema.Type<typeof MyUnion_> { }
export namespace MyUnion {
    export type Encoded = Schema.Codec.Encoded<typeof MyUnion_>;
    export type DecodingServices = Schema.Codec.DecodingServices<typeof MyUnion_>;
    export type EncodingServices = Schema.Codec.EncodingServices<typeof MyUnion_>;
}
export const MyUnion: Schema.Schema<MyUnion, MyUnion.Encoded, MyUnion.DecodingServices> = MyUnion_;
